title: Freeze Mobs on look
description: When You look at mobs they freeze
body:
When You look at Mobs they freeze!



![Frozen Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c63f6a2e6fe85e3aac2e50ee3594650329b76cb.gif)


Also there is Configurable Commands

"/mobfreezer toggle" Toggles the mod

"/mobfreezer distance 1-100" changes the freeze distance, the default is 15 blocks.

My CurseForge Page: curseforge.com/members/saodcf/projects
